name: Home Assistant MCP
description: Deploys the official Home Assistant MCP Server (ha-mcp) in HTTP mode via uvx. Provides a LAN MCP endpoint for Cursor and other HTTP-capable AI clients to control Home Assistant through natural language.

notes.text: Requires a Home Assistant long-lived access token (Profile → Security). The install script verifies HA connectivity before starting the service.
HTTP mode on port 8086 with an auto-generated MCP_SECRET_PATH. Do not expose this port to the internet without a reverse proxy.
Home Assistant OS users may prefer the official MCP Server add-on. This script is for Container/Core or standalone LXC deployments.
Cursor: add the MCP URL printed at install (http://<container-ip>:8086/mcp-<secret>/mcp) to ~/.cursor/mcp.json under mcpServers.
HA and this LXC should be on the same LAN/VLAN. Alpine template: pveam available --section system | grep alpine-3.24
